name: drift-detect --root recurses through all .yaml files under generated-code-quality-standards/
setup:
for f in tree/a/x.yaml tree/a/b/y.yaml tree/c/z.yaml; do printf 'source:
  id: %s
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' "$f" > "$f"; done
